title: Modeling CAR-T cell therapy on-chip
summary: CAR-T cell therapy is modeled on a microfluidic organ-on-chip platform featuring vascularized tumors, enabling more physiologically relevant screening and optimization of cellular immunotherapies. This approach allows rapid assessment of CAR-T efficacy against solid tumors with patient-specific characteristics.

title: A framework for building a synthetic cell
summary: The SynCell Asia Initiative outlines a strategy for creating living cells from scratch by establishing a centralized, AI-driven biofoundry to orchestrate the spatiotemporal integration of core functional modules. This framework addresses the longstanding bottleneck in synthetic biology by providing an organized approach to assembling synthetic cells de novo.

title: Prime editing for precise genome engineering and modulation of fungal metabolism
summary: The fPE7max prime editing system achieves efficient installation of base substitutions, insertions, and deletions to modulate filamentous fungal metabolism. This advancement opens new avenues for engineering industrial fungi in biomanufacturing processes targeting sustainable chemical production.
